Index.meta_description: Kiaya offers premium private travel and taxi services. Experience comfortable airport transfers, hourly charters, and reliable transportation.
Index.hero_subtext: Airport pickups. Hotel transfers. Long-distance rides. Hourly charter. All with clarity, comfort, and reliable support.
Index.features_title: A Smoother Way to Arrive and Move
Index.features_body_text: Flexible private transportation solutions designed for comfort, convenience, and reliable travel across Hokkaido.
Index.feature_1_description: Professional pickup at New Chitose Airport with real-time flight tracking and hassle-free arrival support.
Index.feature_2_description: Seamless transfers between hotels, attractions, and transportation hubs throughout Hokkaido.
Index.feature_3_description: Point-to-point journeys tailored to your schedule with comfortable, professional vehicles.
Index.feature_4_description: Flexible hourly rates for exploring Hokkaido at your own pace with a dedicated vehicle and driver.
Index.travel_options_description: Discover stress-free travel with professional drivers, comfortable vehicles, and flexible transportation solutions. From airport pickups to personalized day trips, we make every journey smooth and enjoyable.
Index.travel_option_1_description: Reliable, on-time pickups and dropoffs at New Chitose Airport. Real-time flight tracking, meet-and-greet service, and assistance with luggage.
Index.travel_option_2_description: Seamless connections between hotels, attractions, and other destinations. Knowledgeable drivers with local area expertise.
Index.travel_option_3_description: Direct transportation between any two locations in Hokkaido. Perfect for business meetings, city tours, or connecting to other transportation.
Index.travel_option_4_description: Hourly charter rates and day trips with your own dedicated vehicle. Explore Hokkaido at your pace with a professional, courteous driver.
Index.vehicle_journey_title: The Right Vehicle for the Journey
Index.vehicle_journey_description: From compact sedans to premium SUVs, every vehicle in our fleet is carefully maintained and matched to your group size, luggage needs, and travel style.
Index.vehicle_journey_compact_sedan_descriptio: Efficient, comfortable, and ideal for navigating Hokkaido's diverse terrain. Our sedans offer fuel efficiency without compromising on comfort.
Index.vehicle_journey_mini_van_description: Efficient, comfortable, and ideal for navigating Hokkaido's diverse terrain. Our sedans offer fuel efficiency without compromising on comfort.
Index.vehicle_journey_comfort_van_description: Our premium van option with generous space and enhanced amenities for comfortable long-distance travel and group journeys.
Index.vehicle_journey_premium_suv_description: The pinnacle of comfort and style. Perfect for executives, special occasions, and travelers who value premium amenities and a refined experience.
Index.how_it_works_image_alt: Professional driver greeting a traveler beside a premium car at the airport
Index.how_it_works_step_1_description: Provide your pickup location, destination, date, time, and any special requests through our simple booking form.
Index.how_it_works_step_2_description: Our team reviews your request and sends you a detailed quote with vehicle type, final price, and confirmation within hours.
Index.how_it_works_step_3_description: On your travel day, your professional driver arrives on time, greets you courteously, and ensures your comfort throughout the journey.
Index.how_it_works_step_4_description: Enjoy your journey in a well-maintained vehicle. Our drivers know the roads and prioritize your safety and comfort at every moment.
Index.how_it_works_step_5_description: Arrive at your destination safely. We welcome your feedback and are here to support you for any follow-up travel needs.
Index.how_it_works_confirmation_description: After you confirm the quote and make payment, your booking is locked in. You'll receive your driver's details, vehicle information, and direct contact number 24 hours before your scheduled pickup.
Index.airport_pickup_description: Everything you need to know for a smooth airport arrival experience.
Index.airport_pickup_image_alt: Professional airport pickup driver greeting travelers beside a premium vehicle
Index.airport_pickup_tracking_description: Provide your flight number when booking. We monitor your flight in real-time and adjust our driver's timing accordingly. If your flight is delayed, your driver waits at no extra charge for up to 2 hours of included waiting time.
Index.airport_pickup_meeting_title: Meeting Your Driver at the Airport
Index.airport_pickup_meeting_description: Your driver will wait in the arrival lobby holding a sign with your name. Look for our professional driver in dark clothing. If you can't spot them, call the contact number provided 24 hours before your pickup.
Index.airport_pickup_luggage_description: Our drivers assist with luggage at no extra cost. If you have special equipment (wheelchairs, sports gear, musical instruments), mention it when booking so we can arrange the right vehicle.
Index.before_you_book_description: Know exactly what you're paying for
Index.before_you_book_pricing_description: Our pricing is transparent and based on route distance, vehicle type, and time of travel. Once you book, the agreed price is locked in. We accept credit cards, bank transfers, and cash payments.
Index.before_you_book_included_description: Your booking includes private vehicle, professional driver, and standard service provisions.
Index.before_you_book_included_item_4: Up to 2 hours complimentary waiting time
Index.before_you_book_extra_description: Some services and requests may involve additional charges.
Index.before_you_book_extra_item_2: Additional passenger pickups or stops (beyond 1 extra stop)
Index.before_you_book_transparency_description: For a complete breakdown of all charges, special conditions, and commercial details, please see our Commercial Disclosure document. We're committed to full transparency in all our pricing.
Index.before_you_book_point_transparent_descri: No hidden fees or surprise charges
Index.before_you_book_point_flexible_descripti: Modify bookings up to 24 hours before pickup
Index.before_you_book_point_secure_description: Price locked in once you confirm your booking
Index.changes_delays_waiting_time_description: We understand travel plans can change. Here's how we handle modifications, delays, and waiting time with clarity and flexibility.
Index.changes_delays_waiting_time_included_des: Every booking includes up to 2 hours of complimentary waiting time. This covers flight delays, luggage collection, or brief stops at your preferred locations.
Index.changes_delays_waiting_time_beyond_descr: If you need waiting time beyond 2 hours (e.g., extended airport delays), additional charges apply at our hourly rate. We'll communicate this with you clearly before charging.
Index.changes_delays_waiting_time_modify_descr: Changes to time, location, or vehicle type must be communicated to us as soon as possible. We'll do our best to accommodate requests up to 24 hours before your scheduled pickup.
Index.changes_delays_waiting_time_cancellation: Cancellations 24+ hours in advance incur no charge. Cancellations within 24 hours may incur a service fee. Contact us immediately if plans change.
Index.changes_delays_waiting_time_support_desc: Your travel plans are important to us. Whether you need to modify your booking, handle unexpected delays, or discuss payment adjustments, our support team is available to assist you with flexibility and professionalism.
Index.accessibility_special_requests_descripti: We're committed to serving all travelers. Whether you have specific accessibility needs or special requests, we're here to accommodate you.
Index.accessibility_special_requests_child_sea: Child seats are available free of charge if requested in advance. Simply select your child's age group when booking and we'll have the appropriate seat ready for safe travel.
Index.accessibility_special_requests_wheelchai: We accommodate passengers with mobility needs. Inform us when booking, and we'll arrange a suitable vehicle with appropriate access and space for your comfort and safety.
Index.accessibility_special_requests_pet_descr: Traveling with a pet? Let us know details when booking. We can arrange appropriate accommodation for your furry companion in a clean, comfortable, and well-maintained vehicle.
Index.accessibility_special_requests_language_: Our drivers speak Japanese and basic English. For complex communication needs or language requirements, mention this when booking and we'll arrange appropriate support.
Index.accessibility_special_requests_unique_de: Every traveler is unique. If you have a special request or requirement not covered above, we'd love to hear from you. Contact us directly at <email>contact@kaiya.taxi</email> with details and we'll work our best to accommodate your request.
Index.accessibility_special_requests_commitmen: Our commitment is to make your travel experience comfortable, safe, and tailored to your needs.
Index.safety_service_standards_description: Every ride is backed by rigorous safety protocols, certified drivers, and well-maintained vehicles — so you can travel with complete confidence.
Index.safety_service_standards_driver_descript: All Kaiya drivers complete comprehensive safety training, local route expertise, and customer service certification. We prioritize professionalism and courtesy.
Index.safety_service_standards_maintenance_des: Every vehicle in our fleet is regularly inspected, maintained, and cleaned to the highest standards. Safety systems are checked before every shift.
Index.safety_service_standards_compliance_desc: Full commercial insurance covers all passengers and their belongings. We comply with all Japanese transportation regulations and licensing requirements.
Index.safety_service_standards_privacy_descrip: Your personal information is secure, confidential, and only used for booking confirmation and service delivery. We never share your data with third parties.
Index.safety_service_standards_terms_descripti: Kaiya operates under strict terms of service designed to ensure passenger safety, professional conduct, and fair practices. We reserve the right to terminate service to any passenger whose behavior violates our code of conduct or creates safety concerns. Full terms are available on request.
Index.faq_description: Find answers quickly by filtering by category or click any question to expand.
Index.faq_book_transfer_question: How do I book a transfer?
Index.faq_book_transfer_answer: Use our online booking form to provide your pickup location, destination, date, and time. Our team will review your request and send you a quote with vehicle type and final price within hours.
Index.faq_hourly_charter_question: Do you offer hourly charter services?
Index.faq_hourly_charter_answer: Yes. Hourly charter services are available for custom journeys, day trips, and flexible itineraries with a dedicated professional driver.
Index.faq_flight_delayed_question: What if my flight is delayed?
Index.faq_flight_delayed_answer: Provide your flight number when booking. We monitor arrivals in real time and include up to 2 hours of complimentary waiting time for delays, luggage collection, or arrival processing.
Index.faq_airport_pickup_answer: Your driver waits in the arrival lobby holding a sign with your name. You will receive driver details, vehicle information, and a direct contact number before pickup.
Index.faq_booking_changes_question: Can I make changes to my booking?
Index.faq_booking_changes_answer: Yes. Changes to time, location, or vehicle type should be sent as soon as possible. We do our best to accommodate requests up to 24 hours before pickup.
Index.faq_cancellation_policy_answer: Cancellations 24+ hours in advance incur no charge. Cancellations within 24 hours may incur a service fee, so contact us immediately if your plans change.
Index.faq_payment_methods_question: What payment methods do you accept?
Index.faq_payment_methods_answer: We accept credit cards, bank transfers, and cash payments. Once you confirm your booking, the agreed price is locked in.
Index.faq_child_seats_answer: Yes. Child seats are available free of charge when requested in advance. Select your child's age group when booking so we can prepare the right seat.
Index.about_kaiya_paragraph_1: Kaiya is a premium private transportation service dedicated to transforming travel across Hokkaido. We combine professional expertise, modern vehicles, and exceptional customer service to deliver reliable, comfortable, and stress-free journeys.
Index.about_kaiya_paragraph_2: Founded on principles of reliability, professionalism, and customer-first commitment, Kaiya has become the preferred choice for travelers seeking premium ground transportation services throughout Japan's stunning northern island.
Index.about_kaiya_image_alt: Kaiya driver opening a premium vehicle door for a passenger
Index.core_values_philosophy_description: We believe every journey should be reliable, comfortable, and stress-free. Whether arriving at the airport, exploring Hokkaido, or traveling for business, Kaiya ensures you arrive on time, refreshed, and satisfied.
Index.core_values_reliability_description: With extensive experience in Hokkaido's transportation landscape, our team knows every route and understands local conditions. Punctuality and consistency are non-negotiable—you can depend on Kaiya every single time.
Index.core_values_customer_description: Your comfort and satisfaction are our top priority. Our drivers are trained in customer service excellence, and our support team is always available to answer questions, accommodate special requests, and resolve concerns promptly.
Index.core_values_quality_description: From vehicle maintenance and driver training to customer communication, we maintain the highest standards across every aspect. Quality isn't optional—it's our unwavering commitment to you.
Index.why_choose_item_1_description: Certified, trained, and courteous professionals dedicated to your comfort
Index.why_choose_item_2_description: Well-maintained vehicles with premium amenities and safety features
Index.why_choose_item_3_description: Clear, upfront quotes with no hidden charges or surprises
Index.why_choose_item_4_description: Always available to assist with your transportation needs and inquiries
Index.why_choose_item_5_description: Flight tracking and live updates for complete peace of mind
Index.why_choose_item_6_description: Custom arrangements for your unique travel requirements and preferences
Index.why_choose_image_1_alt: Kaiya professional driver opening a premium vehicle door
Index.why_choose_image_2_alt: Kaiya driver ready to assist passengers with luggage
Index.join_our_network_description: Whether you're a professional driver, a travel industry partner, or a business looking for reliable transportation solutions — there's a place for you in the Kaiya network.
Index.join_our_network_drivers_description: Join our team of professional drivers and enjoy flexible work with premium compensation. We value professionalism, safety, and customer service.
Index.join_our_network_travel_partners_descrip: Hotels, travel agencies, and tour operators can partner with Kaiya for seamless ground transportation solutions for your clients.
Index.join_our_network_business_description: Corporate clients and logistics partners benefit from our reliable, professional transportation services tailored to business needs.
Index.ready_to_book_description: Start your journey with a simple booking process.
Index.testimonials_subtitle: Discover what our customers say about their experience
Index.testimonial_1_quote: "Excellent service from start to finish. Our driver was punctual, professional, and made our trip from the airport so comfortable."
Index.testimonial_2_quote: "Incredibly smooth experience. Booking was simple, the vehicle was immaculate, and our driver knew exactly how to make us feel at ease."
Index.testimonial_3_quote: "Truly premium service. From the moment we landed, everything was taken care of. I will always choose Kaiya for travel in Hokkaido."
Index.testimonial_4_quote: "The booking process was so straightforward, and the pricing was completely transparent. The driver was waiting for us despite our flight being delayed by an hour."
Index.testimonial_5_quote: "We hired Kaiya for a full-day charter to Niseko. The premium van was incredibly spacious for our family of 5, and the driver was friendly and safe."
Index.testimonial_6_quote: "I travel to Sapporo frequently for business and Kaiya is my go-to transfer service. Consistently excellent, professional, and punctual. Highly recommended."
Index.contact_support_description: Have a question about your booking or need help planning your trip? Our support team is available to assist you anytime. Reach out to us and we'll make sure your travel experience is smooth and stress-free.
Index.contact_support_footer: Our team is available 24/7 to help with bookings, changes, or travel questions.

SignIn.meta_description: Seamlessly sign in to your account with our user-friendly login process.

SignUp.meta_description: Effortlessly create an account through our intuitive sign-up process.

Footer.about_text: Welcome to kiaya taxi, your trusted and registered transportation service provider in kiaya, Japan.

TermsAndConditions.meta_description: Please read these terms carefully before booking your transportation service with Kaiya.
TermsAndConditions.page_subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before booking your transportation service with Kaiya.
TermsAndConditions.section_1_desc_1: By booking a transportation service with Kaiya, Inc., you agree to these terms and conditions. Kaiya provides private transportation services including airport transfers, hotel transfers, point-to-point transportation, hourly charter services, and day trips throughout Hokkaido and the Tokyo area.
TermsAndConditions.section_2_desc_1: All bookings must be made in advance through our official channels or by contacting us directly. A booking is confirmed once you receive written confirmation from Kaiya. We recommend confirming your booking at least 24 hours before your scheduled service.
TermsAndConditions.section_2_desc_2: For airport pickups, please provide accurate flight information and contact details to ensure reliable service.
TermsAndConditions.section_3_desc_1: Pricing is provided at the time of booking and is based on the selected service, distance, and time requirements. All prices are in Japanese Yen unless otherwise specified. Payment must be made according to the terms provided in your booking confirmation.
TermsAndConditions.section_3_desc_2: Transparent pricing is a core commitment of Kaiya. Any additional charges will be communicated before your service begins.
TermsAndConditions.section_4_desc_1: Cancellations must be made at least 24 hours before your scheduled service for a full refund. Cancellations made less than 24 hours before service may incur a cancellation fee. No-shows will be charged the full booking amount.
TermsAndConditions.section_4_desc_2: In case of service delays or issues attributable to Kaiya, we will work with you to resolve the matter fairly. Please contact us immediately if you experience any issues.
TermsAndConditions.section_5_li_1: Providing accurate and complete information at the time of booking
TermsAndConditions.section_5_li_2: Being ready at the agreed pickup location at the scheduled time
TermsAndConditions.section_5_li_3: Treating our vehicles and drivers with respect
TermsAndConditions.section_5_li_4: Following all safety instructions provided by our drivers
TermsAndConditions.section_5_li_5: Being respectful of our no-smoking and substance-free vehicle policy
TermsAndConditions.section_5_desc_2: Passengers are liable for any damage to the vehicle caused by their actions during the service.
TermsAndConditions.section_6_desc_1: Child car seats are available free of charge if requested in advance during booking. Please provide details of any special requirements, accessibility needs, or additional services at the time of booking. Kaiya will make every effort to accommodate reasonable requests.
TermsAndConditions.section_7_desc_1: Kaiya is fully insured and maintains comprehensive coverage for all vehicles. Our drivers are professional and trained to the highest safety standards. However, Kaiya is not responsible for:
TermsAndConditions.section_7_li_1: Delays caused by traffic, weather, or circumstances beyond our control
TermsAndConditions.section_7_li_2: Loss or damage to personal belongings left in the vehicle
TermsAndConditions.section_7_li_3: Injuries resulting from passenger non-compliance with safety instructions
TermsAndConditions.section_8_desc_1: We understand that schedules can change. If you need to modify your booking, please contact us as soon as possible. Waiting time for airport pickups is typically 30 minutes from your specified time. Additional waiting time will be charged at our standard hourly rate.
TermsAndConditions.section_8_desc_2: In case of significant delays beyond our control, we will communicate with you and work to minimize any inconvenience.
TermsAndConditions.section_9_desc_1: Your personal information is treated with the utmost respect and confidentiality. Please refer to our Privacy Policy for details on how we collect, use, and protect your data.
TermsAndConditions.section_10_desc_1: For questions, concerns, or support, please contact us:
TermsAndConditions.section_11_desc_1: Kaiya reserves the right to update these terms and conditions at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. Your continued use of our services following the posting of changes constitutes your acceptance of those changes.
TermsAndConditions.section_11_desc_2: These terms and conditions are governed by the laws of Japan. By using Kaiya's services, you agree to the jurisdiction of Japanese courts.
TermsAndConditions.cta_desc: Contact Kaiya support for any booking or legal questions.
